display_text: Silencer Aghanim's Scepter: Global Silence applies Arcane Curse to heroes for the duration of Global Silence. This upgrade counters spell-spamming heroes by punishing frequent ability usage, forcing enemies to either disengage or suffer prolonged damage and silence.
search_text: Silencer Aghanim Scepter anti-spell-spam counter-caster Arcane Curse synergy

display_text: Silencer Aghanim's Shard: Increases the Intelligence stolen per kill. This upgrade enhances Silencer's snowball potential by accelerating his Intelligence theft, making him a stronger late-game threat against mana-dependent heroes and amplifying his right-click damage.
search_text: Silencer Aghanim Shard Intelligence steal snowball anti-mage late-game scaling
